# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Overview

Sourdough (`@dbt-labs/sourdough`) is a shared React component library for dbt Labs UIs. It lives inside the `bakery` monorepo at `packages/sourdough`. Published privately to GitHub Packages.

## Common Commands

```bash
pnpm start              # Run Storybook dev server on port 6006
pnpm build              # Full build (Vite compile + legacy esbuild)
pnpm build:compile      # Vite build only (outputs to dist/)
pnpm lint               # ESLint (zero warnings allowed)
pnpm lint-fix           # ESLint with auto-fix
pnpm typecheck          # TypeScript type checking (no emit)
pnpm test               # Run all tests (Cypress component + ryecons)
pnpm test:cypress       # Cypress component tests (headless Chrome)
pnpm test:cypress:dev   # Cypress component tests (interactive)
pnpm ryecons:generate   # Regenerate ryecon icon components from SVGs
```

Run a single Cypress spec:

```bash
pnpm cypress run --component --browser chrome --spec "./src/components/Button/Button.spec.tsx"
```

## Architecture

### Entry Point & Exports

`src/sourdough.ts` is the library entry point. It barrel-exports from:

- `components/` — all UI components
- `context/` — ThemeProvider, PortalNode, SkeletonProvider, InertContextProvider
- `externals/` — re-exports of headlessui and react-hook-form (centralizes third-party versions)
- `hooks/` — shared React hooks (clickOutside, containerPlacement, useLiveRegion, useDarkMode, etc.)
- `utils/` — utility functions (ansiToHtml, formatBytes, formUtils, etc.)
- `globalConstants` and `globalTypes`

### Component Organization

Each component directory typically contains:

- `ComponentName.tsx` — main component implementation
- `index.ts` — public exports (only what consumers should use)
- `ComponentName.stories.tsx` — Storybook stories
- `ComponentName.spec.tsx` — Cypress component tests
- `*.internal.tsx` / `*.internal.ts` — internal files NOT exported publicly
- `ComponentName.docs.mdx` — API documentation (optional)

Major component groupings under `src/components/`:

- **`forms/`** — form controls (Checkbox, Dropdown, Input, MultiSelect, RadioGroup, Toggle, etc.)
- **`tables/`** — TanStack React Table wrappers (Table, CompactTable, cells, subcomponents)
- **`layouts/`** — page layout components (AuthenticationLayout, BaseLayout, FormLayout)
- **`viz/`** — D3-based chart/visualization components (Chart, Plot, Legend, axis, shapes)
- **`ryecons/`** — auto-generated icon components from SVG sources in `ryecons/svg/`

### Base Interfaces

Components extend these base types from `src/globalTypes.ts`:

- **`SourdoughComponent`** — `className`, `testId`, `trackingId`, `skeleton`
- **`BaseInputProps`** — extends with `label`, `tooltip`, `error`, `isDisabled`, `isOptional`, etc.

### Build System

- **Vite** (primary): builds to `dist/` in ESM + CJS formats. Uses React Compiler via babel plugin, with forms/tables directories excluded due to react-hook-form incompatibility.
- **esbuild** (legacy): `scripts/build.mjs` builds to `dist-legacy/` for older consumers.
- **Turbo**: orchestrates builds/tests across the monorepo.

### Styling

- **Tailwind CSS 3** with a custom theme in `tailwind.config.cjs`
- Design tokens imported from `@dbt-labs/biga` (sibling package)
- Fonts: Inter (sans), Inter Tight (headings), IBM Plex Mono (code)
- Custom typography classes: `.font-heading-1` through `.font-heading-6`, `.font-body`, `.font-caption`, `.font-label`, `.font-code`
- Use `tailwind-merge` for merging Tailwind classes and `classnames` for conditional classes
- Dark mode via `class` strategy

### Testing

- **Cypress Component Testing** — specs are `.spec.tsx` files colocated with components
- Spec pattern: `./src/**/*.spec.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}`
- Retries: 2 in run mode, 0 in open mode
- ESLint rule prevents committing `.only` focused tests

### Path Aliases

TypeScript paths configured in `tsconfig.json`:

- `@` → `./src/`
- `@/*` → `./src/*`

### ESLint

- Extends `@dbt-labs/eslint-config/react`
- Custom plugins: `@dbt-labs/biga` (design token validation), `sentence-case` (UI copy casing)
- `no-console` is off in stories, scripts, and cypress files
- Unused vars: `_` prefix pattern allowed for ignored args and destructured arrays
